'''鈭歠-t-n''' ('''kafatan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbow|imbow]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbow|imbow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-t-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafatan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifatan|thifatan]] || [[word:jifatan|jifatan]] || [[word:shifatan|shifatan]] || [[word:kifatan|kifatan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufatan|thuthufatan]] || [[word:jujufatan|jujufatan]] || [[word:shushufatan|shushufatan]] || [[word:kukufatan|kukufatan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufatan|thufatan]] || [[word:jufatan|jufatan]] || [[word:shufatan|shufatan]] || [[word:kufatan|kufatan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufatan|thufatan]] || [[word:jufatan|jufatan]] || [[word:shufatan|shufatan]] || [[word:kufatan|kufatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefatan|thefatan]] || [[word:jefatan|jefatan]] || [[word:shefatan|shefatan]] || [[word:kefatan|kefatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofatan|thothofatan]] || [[word:jojofatan|jojofatan]] || [[word:shoshofatan|shoshofatan]] || [[word:kokofatan|kokofatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofatan|thofatan]] || [[word:jofatan|jofatan]] || [[word:shofatan|shofatan]] || [[word:kofatan|kofatan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofatan|thofatan]] || [[word:jofatan|jofatan]] || [[word:shofatan|shofatan]] || [[word:kofatan|kofatan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fatan|th忙fatan]] || [[word:j忙fatan|j忙fatan]] || [[word:sh忙fatan|sh忙fatan]] || [[word:k忙fatan|k忙fatan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafatan|thathafatan]] || [[word:jajafatan|jajafatan]] || [[word:shashafatan|shashafatan]] || [[word:kakafatan|kakafatan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafatan|thafatan]] || [[word:jafatan|jafatan]] || [[word:shafatan|shafatan]] || [[word:kafatan|kafatan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafatan|thafatan]] || [[word:jafatan|jafatan]] || [[word:shafatan|shafatan]] || [[word:kafatan|kafatan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafatan|shafatan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafatan|goshafatan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafatan|gokishafatan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafatan眉|shafatan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafatankn眉|goshafatankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatan眉|gokishafatan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafatansh毛|shafatansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafatanksh毛|goshafatanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafatansh毛|gokishafatansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatanro|shafatanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatankro|goshafatankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatanro|gokishafatanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatanmu|shafatanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatankmu|goshafatankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatanmu|gokishafatanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafatansher|shafatansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafatanksher|goshafatanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafatansher|gokishafatansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafatang|shafatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafatankng|goshafatankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafatang|gokishafatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafatanya|shafatanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafatankya|goshafatankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafatanya|gokishafatanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafatanyam|shafatanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafatankyam|goshafatankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafatanyam|gokishafatanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafatan眉sh毛|shafatan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafatankn眉sh毛|goshafatankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafatan眉sh毛|gokishafatan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatan眉ro|shafatan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatankn眉ro|goshafatankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatan眉ro|gokishafatan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatan眉mu|shafatan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatankn眉mu|goshafatankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatan眉mu|gokishafatan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafatansh毛n眉|shafatansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafatanksh毛n眉|goshafatanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatansh毛n眉|gokishafatansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatansh毛ro|shafatansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatanksh毛ro|goshafatanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatansh毛ro|gokishafatansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatansh毛mu|shafatansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatanksh毛mu|goshafatanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatansh毛mu|gokishafatansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafatanron眉|shafatanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafatankron眉|goshafatankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatanron眉|gokishafatanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafatanrosh毛|shafatanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafatankrosh毛|goshafatankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafatanrosh毛|gokishafatanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafatanromu|shafatanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafatankromu|goshafatankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafatanromu|gokishafatanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafatanmun眉|shafatanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafatankmun眉|goshafatankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafatanmun眉|gokishafatanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafatanmush毛|shafatanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafatankmush毛|goshafatankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafatanmush毛|gokishafatanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafatanmuro|shafatanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafatankmuro|goshafatankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafatanmuro|gokishafatanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
